## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link issues with "Closes #123". -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs / test / refactor / chore / build / ci
- [ ] BREAKING CHANGE (describe the migration below)

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes (format, lint, typecheck, tests)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests; a new failure mode became an eval case
- [ ] Docs updated (`README` / `CONTRACT.md` / `docs/`) if the surface changed
- [ ] No secrets, PII, or private data added

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything to call out: trade-offs, follow-ups, migration steps. -->
